🛠️ Tools for Stakeholder Research

🤖
ChatGPT
Simulate stakeholder queries to see what AI surfaces about your solution.
 🔮
Perplexity
Run persona-specific queries and see cited sources.
 🎭
Claude
Test CFO, CTO, and CISO query scenarios.
